prompt: A close-up portrait of a gorgeous East Asian woman surrounded by a dense, vibrant bush of white jasmine and small roses. She is wearing a white lace headwrap and an off-the-shoulder lace dress. Her makeup features strong coral-pink blush, natural-looking long fingernails, and she is lightly touching a jasmine flower. The scene is bathed in golden hour dapple sunlight, casting sharp yet soft patterns of leaf shadows across her face.Small pink petals are subtly placed around her eyes and on her blush, and a single white butterfly is depicted in mid-flight near her right hand. The shot should be shallow depth-of-field, sharp focus on her face, and have a beautiful bokeh of light and flowers in the background. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, cinematic lighting
